sections.paragraph:
& צְרֹור m. pl. צְרֹרֹות ( Gen 42:35)-

(1) a bundle, 1Sa 25:29 Son 1:13 specially, a bundle of money, a purse, Gen 42:35 Pro 7:20. As to the passage Pro 26:8, see מַרְגֵּמָה .

(2) i.q. צוּר No. 1, a stone, a little stone, 2Sa 17:13 Amo 9:9 (where others understand grain).

(3) [Zeror], pr.n. m. 1Sa 9:1.
